meta.maintainer_note: 공식 번호·기관명은 배포 전 최종 확인. MCP는 전화 연결하지 않고 안내만 제공.
sources: 행정안전부 공중화장실 비상벨 안내(시설 관리인 연락)

lines.role_en: Fire, rescue, ambulance, hazmat, marine accidents
lines.not_for_ko: 범죄·경찰 필요 → 112 / 병원 어디 갈지 모름 → 1339

lines.role_en: Government civil complaints, non-emergency (incl. civil defense info)

restroom_emergency_bell.description_ko: 화장실 안 벽에 있는 **비상벨**은 119로 연결되지 않습니다. 누르면 **해당 시설(관리실·경비·매점)** 로 연결되어 직원이 오도록 합니다. 넘어짐·문이 안 열림·몸이 불편할 때 **먼저 비상벨**을 누르세요.
restroom_emergency_bell.description_en: The **emergency button** inside the restroom does **not** dial 119. It alerts **on-site staff** (management, security). Press it first if you fell, feel unwell, or cannot exit.
restroom_emergency_bell.when_no_response_ko: 응답이 없거나 의식·호흡에 문제가 있으면 **119**를 누르세요. 범죄·위협이면 **112**.
restroom_emergency_bell.when_no_response_en: If no one comes or breathing/consciousness is affected, call **119**. For crime/threats, call **112**.

hotlines.when_ko: 화재, 구조·구급, 유해물질·가스 **누출**, 해양 사고, 의식 없음·심한 출혈·호흡 곤란, **안전 위협 요소** 발견(낙하물·위험 시설 등)
hotlines.when_en: Fire, rescue, ambulance, hazmat/gas leaks, marine accidents, unconsciousness, severe bleeding, breathing difficulty, discovered safety hazards
Crime, assault, kidnapping, stalking, cybercrime/hacking, traffic accidents requiring police

hotlines.when_ko: 정부 **민원 안내**·**비긴급** 상담 (민방위 관련 포함). **생명·안전 긴급 아님**
hotlines.when_en: Government civil complaints, non-emergency consultation (incl. civil defense). Not for life-threatening emergencies

hotlines.when_ko: 119 전 **병원·응급실·야간진료** 어디로 갈지 모르겠을 때, 아이/어르신 아픔, 응급 여부가 애매할 때
hotlines.when_en: Unsure if ER vs clinic, child/elderly illness, where to go before/during emergency

hotlines.when_ko: 외국인 관광객·체류자, 병원/약국/택시 가는 길 **말이 안 통할 때**
hotlines.when_en: Foreign visitors who need language help at hospital, pharmacy, or taxi

hotlines.when_ko: 약·화학물질·가스 등 **먹거나 마신 것**이 걱정될 때 (의식 변화·경련 있으면 119 병행)
hotlines.when_en: Suspected poisoning from medicine or chemicals (call 119 if unconscious or seizing)
Severe emotional crisis, self-harm or suicidal thoughts

hotlines.when_ko: 패닉·극심한 불안 등 정신건강 긴급 상담 (즉각적 신체 위험은 119)
hotlines.when_en: Panic, severe anxiety; call 119 for immediate physical danger
Domestic violence, sexual violence, stalking support
Children and youth in crisis. For school violence **reporting**, use **117**
Power outage or electrical fault (KEPCO). Call **119** for shock, sparks, or fire

hotlines.when_ko: **가스 누출**·가스 설비 **사고** 신고 (한국가스안전공사). 냄새·폭발 위험·의식 잃음 → **119** 병행
hotlines.when_en: Gas leak or gas facility accident (KGS). Also **119** if smell, explosion risk, or unconsciousness

life_threatening.headline_en: **In this situation → call 119** (disaster, safety, ambulance) first.
life_threatening.action_ko: 즉시 119. 통화 후 필요 시 find_emergency_room으로 병상 확인.
life_threatening.action_en: Call 119 immediately. Then use find_emergency_room for bed availability if needed.

medical_urgent.label_ko: 아프긴 한데 응급실 갈지 모르겠을 때
example_questions_ko: 주말 밤인데 병원 어디로 가? 전화 먼저?
medical_urgent.headline_ko: **이 상황에서는 → 1339** (응급의료 상담)를 먼저 전화하세요. 생명 위협이면 119.
medical_urgent.headline_en: **In this situation → call 1339** first. If life-threatening, call 119.
medical_urgent.action_ko: 응급 여부 모르면 1339 → find_open_clinic 또는 find_emergency_room
medical_urgent.action_en: If unsure, 1339 first → then find_open_clinic or find_emergency_room

restroom_help.headline_ko: **이 상황에서는 → 화장실 벽 비상벨**을 먼저 누르세요. (119 아님, 시설 직원 호출) 응답 없으면 119.
restroom_help.headline_en: **In this situation → press the restroom wall button** first (not 119). If no response, call 119.
restroom_help.action_ko: 화장실 안 **비상벨** 먼저 → 응답 없으면 119/112. modu-emergencybell로 비상벨 있는 화장실 검색.
restroom_help.action_en: Press **restroom emergency button** first → if no response, 119/112. Search restrooms with bells via modu-emergencybell.

example_questions_ko: 외국인인데 병원 가야 해 어디에 전화?
영어로 응급 전화 할 수 있어?

poison.headline_en: **In this situation → 1577-1377** (poison control). Also 119 if unconscious or seizing.
poison.action_en: Call poison center. 119 if unconscious or seizing.

police.headline_en: **In this situation → call 112** (police). Also 119 for serious injury.

mental_crisis.headline_en: **In this situation → 129** or **1393**. Call 119 if active self-harm.

unsure.headline_en: **112**=police, **119**=disaster/ambulance, **110**=non-emergency civil service. Life threat → **119**, crime → **112**, medical unsure → **1339**.
unsure.action_en: Life/safety → 119, crime → 112, medical unsure → 1339. Civil complaints only → 110.

school_violence.headline_en: **In this situation → 117** (school violence report). **112** if immediate physical danger or crime.
school_violence.action_ko: 117 신고·상담. 청소년 정서 위기는 1388. 폭력 진행 중이면 112.
school_violence.action_en: 117 for reporting. 1388 for youth counseling. 112 if violence in progress.

utility_electric.headline_en: **In this situation → 123** (KEPCO). **119** for shock, sparks, or fire.
utility_electric.action_ko: 123 전기 고장 신고. 감전·화재 징후면 119 우선.
utility_electric.action_en: 123 for outage/fault. 119 first if shock or fire signs.

utility_gas.headline_en: **In this situation → 1544-4500** (gas safety). Also **119** if strong smell, unconsciousness, or explosion risk.

safety_hazard.headline_en: **In this situation → 119** (safety/disaster report). **112** if immediate crime/violence risk.
safety_hazard.action_en: 119 for safety hazards. 112 if crime/violence involved.
